questions.question: In the module 'Fondamentaux du RL', which statement best defines agent?

choices.A: agent is a foundational idea in apprentissage par renforcement used to understand fondamentaux du rl.
choices.B: environnement is a foundational idea in apprentissage par renforcement used to understand fondamentaux du rl.
choices.C: etat is a foundational idea in apprentissage par renforcement used to understand fondamentaux du rl.
choices.D: action is a foundational idea in apprentissage par renforcement used to understand fondamentaux du rl.

questions.explanation: agent is correctly defined by the first option because it captures the core idea used in fondamentaux du rl.

questions.question: Why is agent important in this module?

choices.D: It helps learners identify the basic role of agent before using more advanced workflows.
